headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on AvalonBay Communities, Raises Price Target to $202
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Lewis   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $201 to $202.
